positive: Minimalist cosmic whale silhouette swimming through bioluminescent nebulae, abstract stained-glass style, deep sapphire blues and glowing teal accents on a contrasting charcoal black background. Clean, vector-art quality with strong defined edges. The composition is centralized and symmetrically balanced, featuring constellations and stylized celestial flora elements. High contrast, smooth gradients, ethereal yet structured print ready art. Suitable for screen printing on apparel.
